alt.ro: Un copil loveste o paleta de antrenament tinuta de un instructor imbracat pentru sala de operatie, chiar la patul de spital.
alt.en: A child strikes a training pad held by an instructor dressed for the operating room right at the hospital bedside.

caption.ro: Exercitiile de Budo muta atentia dinspre frica spre actiune.
caption.en: Budo exercises shift attention away from fear and toward action.

alt.ro: Prim-plan cu un copil in spital care priveste o pasare origami verde asezata pe masa.
alt.en: Close-up of a child in hospital looking at a green origami bird resting on a tray.

caption.ro: Momentele mici de creativitate si respiratie dau spatiu sperantei.
caption.en: Small moments of creativity and breathing make room for hope.

alt.ro: O adolescenta si un instructor in echipament medical arata semnul de aprobare intr-un salon de spital.
alt.en: A teenage girl and an instructor in medical gear give a thumbs up in a hospital room.

caption.ro: Programul construieste incredere chiar in mijlocul tratamentului.
caption.en: The program builds confidence in the middle of treatment.

alt.ro: Un instructor si o fetita aflata in spital stau unul langa altul pe pat si ridica bratul intr-o pozitie de forta, vazuti din spate.
alt.en: An instructor and a young girl in hospital sit side by side on the bed and raise an arm in a strength pose, seen from behind.

caption.ro: Postura, respiratia si vocea devin instrumente de control.
caption.en: Posture, breathing, and voice become tools for control.

alt.ro: Un instructor pune bratul in jurul unui copil si il insoteste prin salonul de spital.
alt.en: An instructor places an arm around a child and walks with them through the hospital room.

caption.ro: Relatia de incredere este parte din metoda, nu doar cadrul ei.
caption.en: Trust is part of the method, not just the setting around it.

alt.ro: Mai multi voluntari in echipament Budo stau in jurul unui adolescent pe patul de spital.
alt.en: Several Budo volunteers stand around a teenager sitting on a hospital bed.

caption.ro: Comunitatea face diferenta dintre o vizita si un program sustenabil.
caption.en: Community makes the difference between a visit and a sustainable program.

alt.ro: Fotografie de grup din Napoli, din primii ani ai programului Kids Kicking Cancer.
alt.en: Group photograph from Naples in the early years of the Kids Kicking Cancer program.

caption.ro: Reteaua internationala a crescut prin comunitati locale care au dus metoda mai departe.
caption.en: The international network grew through local communities that carried the method forward.

alt.ro: Grup de practicanti si sustinatori fotografiati intr-o sala mare din Roma.
alt.en: A group of practitioners and supporters photographed inside a large room in Rome.

caption.ro: Istoria capitolului romanesc poate fi prezentata ca parte a unei mosteniri europene mai largi.
caption.en: The Romanian chapter can be framed as part of a broader European legacy.

alt.ro: Fotografie documentara cu fondatorul KKC alaturi de un reprezentant al programului.
alt.en: Documentary photograph of the KKC founder alongside a program representative.

caption.ro: Legatura cu miscarea internationala aduce legitimitate si continuitate.
caption.en: The link to the international movement brings legitimacy and continuity.

alt.ro: Colaj cu o aparitie in presa italiana despre Kids Kicking Cancer.
alt.en: Collage showing Italian press coverage about Kids Kicking Cancer.

caption.ro: Vizibilitatea publica este parte din misiune, nu doar un rezultat secundar.
caption.en: Public visibility is part of the mission, not just a side effect.
